step_rationale: Endogenous stem cell mobilization; off-cascade myocardial repair mechanism.
mechanism: Stem cell factor (KITLG) mobilizes bone-marrow progenitor cells via KIT signaling to support post-MI myocardial repair and regeneration.

references.title: Modified Taohong Siwu decoction improves cardiac function after myocardial ischaemia and reperfusion in rats by promoting endogenous stem cell mobilization and regulating metabolites.
